_comment: Staging R2 lifecycle. Real code-written prefixes (verified in app/): manuscripts/ (originals - durable), files/ (legacy compile output - durable), exports/ (durable in staging: sealed packages reference export objects), previews/ (rebuildable), plus operational backups/ and failed/. Aspirational prefixes from the data map (originals/, revisions/, sealed/, sources/, temp/) are not yet written by code - see docs/release/staging/R2_STAGING_SPEC.md. NO rule below may match manuscripts/, files/ or exports/. Apply: aws s3api put-bucket-lifecycle-configuration --bucket thesis-staging --endpoint-url https://<R2_ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --lifecycle-configuration file://deploy/r2-lifecycle-staging.json
